source: BTD Mod Helper game data export

upgrades.name: Full Metal Jacket
upgrades.description: Shots pop through 4 layers of Bloon, and both bullets and shrapnel can pop Lead and Frozen Bloons.

upgrades.name: Large Calibre
upgrades.description: Shots can pop through 7 layers of Bloon.

upgrades.name: Deadly Precision
upgrades.description: 20 damage per shot, plus bonus damage to ceramics.

upgrades.name: Maim MOAB
upgrades.description: Deals much more damage and projectiles immobilize MOAB-Class Bloons for a short time.

upgrades.name: Cripple MOAB
upgrades.description: Crippled MOABs are immobilized for longer and take extra damage from all other attacks.

upgrades.name: Night Vision Goggles
upgrades.description: Allows Sniper to detect and do an additional 2 damage to Camo Bloons.

upgrades.name: Shrapnel Shot
upgrades.description: Damaged Bloons spray out a cone of sharp shrapnel.

upgrades.name: Bouncing Bullet
upgrades.description: Shots bounce to new targets up to 2 times.

upgrades.name: Supply Drop
upgrades.description: Supply Drop Ability: drops a crate full of cash. Activates Supply Drop for other Snipers. Regular attack also damages Lead Bloons and increases Shrapnel popping power.

upgrades.name: Elite Sniper
upgrades.description: Supply drop gives much more cash. Grants Elite targeting prio and faster reload to all snipers.

upgrades.name: Full Auto Rifle
upgrades.description: Fully automatic weapon with incredible popping power.

upgrades.name: Elite Defender
upgrades.description: Fires super fast and does more damage to MOAB-class Bloons. Fires faster the further the Bloons are along the track. Gains 4x attack speed briefly on losing lives.
